role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the utility pole text ('189南') and script identification.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues without overstepping.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed plant types (hedges, forest composition) and regional flora.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Identified specific road infrastructure (bollards, pole plates) and standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Japan as the primary candidate. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the definitive regulatory and linguistic markers over the ambiguous landscape/botanical similarities with South Korea.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately described the visible text on the pole.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly identified the forested hills and road type.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the hedges and forest background.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the white/orange bollards and pole plate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly linked the visual elements to the specific architectural style.
